title: The Death of Nicou by Thomas Chatterton
content:
On Tiber's banks, Tiber, whose waters glide
In slow meanders down to Gaigra's side;
And circling all the horrid mountain round,
Rushes impetuous to th

title: An Excelente Balade of Charitie: As Wroten bie the Gode Pri by Thomas Chatterton
content:
In Virgynë the sweltrie sun gan sheene,
And hotte upon the mees did caste his raie;
The apple rodded from its palie greene,
And the mole peare did ben

title: A Hymn for Christmas Day by Thomas Chatterton
content:
Almighty Framer of the Skies!
O let our pure devotion rise,
Like Incense in thy Sight!
Wrapt in impenetrable Shade
The Texture of our Souls were made
